{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gar
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gar]] has navy training.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gar]] analyzed a spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Only for a second,” Gar said, as he analyzed the spell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
